# o2-scalpel-haskell

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Haskell via haskell-language-server-wrapper

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-haskell --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `haskell-language-server-wrapper` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .hs, .lhs

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol across the workspace |
| `scalpel_extract` | Extract selection into a let-binding or function |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply hlint + retrie diagnostic quick-fixes |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
